fields.name: loan_applications
fields.description: A list of loan applications submitted to the risk and compliance department

children.name: application_id
children.description: Unique identifier for a loan application

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Timestamp when the loan application was submitted

children.name: applicant
children.description: Information about the applicant

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: full_name
children.description: Full name of the applicant

children.name: date_of_birth
children.description: Date of birth for the applicant

children.name: email
children.description: Email address of the applicant

children.name: phone
children.description: Phone number of the applicant

children.name: loan_details
children.description: Information about the loan being applied for

children.name: loan_type
children.description: Type of loan being applied for (e.g. mortgage, personal)

children.name: requested_amount
children.description: Amount requested for the loan

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency of the loan (e.g. GBP, USD)

children.name: term_months
children.description: Term of the loan in months

children.name: interest_rate_type
children.description: Type of interest rate for the loan (e.g. fixed, variable)

children.name: purpose
children.description: Purpose of the loan (e.g. residential property purchase, home improvement)

children.name: employment
children.description: Information about the applicant's employment

children.name: employment_status
children.description: Current employment status (e.g. employed, self-employed)

children.name: employer_name
children.description: Name of the applicant's employer

children.name: job_title
children.description: Job title of the applicant

children.name: annual_income
children.description: Annual income of the applicant

children.name: employment_start_date
children.description: Date when the applicant started their current employment

children.name: financial_profile
children.description: Information about the applicant's financial profile

children.name: total_assets
children.description: Total assets of the applicant

children.name: total_liabilities
children.description: Total liabilities of the applicant

children.name: credit_score
children.description: Credit score of the applicant

children.name: existing_loans
children.description: Number of existing loans for the applicant

children.name: default_history
children.description: Whether the applicant has a history of defaults

children.name: credit_inquiries_last_6m
children.description: Number of credit inquiries made by the applicant in the last 6 months

children.name: collateral
children.description: Information about the collateral being used for the loan

children.name: property_value
children.description: Value of the property being used as collateral

children.name: property_location
children.description: Location of the property being used as collateral

children.name: loan_to_value
children.description: Loan-to-value ratio for the loan

children.name: application_status
children.description: Current status of the loan application (e.g. under review, pending compliance review)

children.name: submitted_by
children.description: Name of the person who submitted the loan application
